resources.string: Ready to start a new chat.
Wait for the current response or cancel it before starting a new chat.
Pair with AetherLink Runtime before starting a new chat.
Archive chats, restore them later, or permanently delete archived chats.
Wait for the current response before changing chat history.
Connect to AetherLink Runtime before refreshing chat history.
All-chat actions stay closed until you open this section.
Ready to archive all active chats.
Wait for the current response before archiving chats.
Archive all active chats? They stay saved, leave the main list, and stop contributing to Memory.
Confirm again to archive every active chat. Archived chats can be restored later.
Permanently delete "%1$s"? This is available because the chat is archived.
Confirm permanent deletion of "%1$s". This cannot be undone.
Ready to permanently delete archived chats.
No archived chats to permanently delete.
Wait for the current response before permanently deleting archived chats.
Permanently delete all archived chats? Active chats stay saved.
Confirm permanent deletion of every archived chat. This cannot be undone.
Scan a trusted AetherLink QR before loading models or chatting.
Scan the latest AetherLink Runtime QR. To connect from another network, the QR must include a relay, VPN, tunnel, or private-overlay route both devices can reach.
AetherLink trusts only QR-verified AetherLink Runtime. Model providers stay private.
Wait for the current connection attempt before scanning again.
Ready to scan the latest QR.
Point the camera at the latest AetherLink Runtime QR. The QR must verify AetherLink Runtime and include a connection both devices can reach.
That code is not an AetherLink Runtime QR.
This AetherLink QR is invalid or expired. Scan the latest Runtime QR.
QR scan target. Center the AetherLink Runtime QR inside this frame.
AetherLink uses the camera only to scan pairing QR codes.
Open app settings and allow Camera to scan AetherLink pairing QR codes.
Diagnostic fallback only. Paste AetherLink Runtime QR text when camera scanning cannot be tested; normal pairing remains camera QR scanning.
Paste AetherLink Runtime QR text before continuing.
Use AetherLink Runtime QR text that starts with aetherlink://pair.
Trusted runtime details are saved on this device and can be removed at any time.
Discovery and route diagnostics stay here when QR pairing needs help.
Use these checks only when QR pairing cannot connect.
Trusted route discovery is already running.
Ready to stop trusted route discovery.
Start trusted route discovery before stopping it.
This QR identified %1$s, but it cannot reconnect across networks without protected connection details. Generate the latest QR in AetherLink Runtime and scan it again.
QR scanned. This QR identified %1$s, but it cannot reconnect across networks without protected connection details. Generate the latest QR in AetherLink Runtime and scan it again. Waiting for %1$s
Find a reachable AetherLink Runtime, then scan its QR code to establish trust.
Remove %1$s? Pair again for model access.
Scan the AetherLink Runtime QR first. Route diagnostics stay off until trust is established.
Scan a pairing QR, then AetherLink restores trusted connections automatically.
This device and the trusted runtime are connected.
Connect to the trusted runtime to use models.
Authenticated with %1$s. Chat and models stay routed through AetherLink Runtime.
Scan the trusted QR again to return to normal access.
Connecting to %1$s through a trusted route.
Scan the AetherLink Runtime QR before connecting.
Trusted runtime saved. Scan the latest AetherLink Runtime QR to refresh connectivity.
%1$s is trusted. AetherLink will restore the connection when available.
Reconnect to the trusted runtime automatically when this device returns to the app.
Auto reconnect is paused. Use Connect to resume trusted runtime restore.
Off. Pair with AetherLink Runtime before enabling auto reconnect.
Ollama is not responding through the runtime. Check the provider in AetherLink Runtime, then refresh health.
LM Studio is not responding through the runtime. Check the provider in AetherLink Runtime, then refresh health.
%1$s is not responding through the runtime. Check the provider in AetherLink Runtime, then refresh health.
Try again after the provider is running.
Choose a model exposed by AetherLink Runtime.
Selected model is missing from the runtime list. Refresh or choose another.
Restoring the saved model selection from AetherLink Runtime.
Connect to the trusted runtime before refreshing models.
Wait for the current response or cancel it before changing models.
Vision-capable AetherLink Runtime chat model required.
This image needs a vision-capable AetherLink Runtime chat model. Choose an installed vision model from AetherLink Runtime.
Vision model required for image attachments.
Chat model picker. Selected chat model %1$s.
Models are loaded through AetherLink Runtime, not directly from this app.
Connect to the trusted runtime before loading models.
Connect to the trusted runtime before loading models.
Try another model name, provider, service, or source.
%1$d of %2$d files attached. Attachment limit reached.
Shared text and files added to draft.
Pair with AetherLink Runtime first. Model providers stay private behind the trusted runtime.
Connect to the trusted runtime before chatting.
This network cannot reach the saved route. Prepare a reachable connection route in AetherLink Runtime, then scan the latest QR.
That QR points to a route this device cannot reach. Prepare a route reachable from both devices, then scan the latest QR.
Choose a chat model from the chat header before sending.
Receiving a streamed answer from AetherLink Runtime.
Receiving a streamed answer from AetherLink Runtime.
Chat requests are relayed through AetherLink Runtime.
Connect to the trusted runtime before chatting.
Check the model service in AetherLink Runtime, then refresh health.
Ready to disconnect from the trusted runtime.
Scan the pairing QR before sending.
Connect to the trusted runtime first.
Scan the latest AetherLink Runtime QR before sending.
Refresh models or choose another model before sending.
Install or choose an installed model before sending.
Choose a vision-capable model before sending an image.
Wait for the current response or cancel it.
Wait for this chat to finish loading.
Ready to regenerate the latest response.
Ready to use this message as a draft.
This app connects through AetherLink. Model providers stay private.
AetherLink keeps model access on the trusted runtime. This device controls the session.
Follows the device system light or dark appearance.
AetherLink uses the device system language when supported.
Choose the embedding model AetherLink Runtime uses for memory and retrieval.
Install this model in AetherLink Runtime before selecting it.
Saved memory indexing model is missing from the runtime list. Refresh or choose another.
Restoring the saved memory indexing model from AetherLink Runtime.
No memory indexing models are available from AetherLink Runtime.
Connect to the trusted runtime before choosing an embedding model.
Notes stored on the trusted runtime for future chats.
Preference, project detail, or instruction to remember
Wait for the current response before changing memory.
Connect to the trusted runtime to load saved memory.
Connect to the trusted runtime to load and manage memory.
Memory shown in this session is read-only. Reconnect the trusted runtime to refresh or manage it.
Delete memory %1$s from the trusted runtime?
Scan the latest AetherLink Runtime QR with connection details.
The QR verified the runtime, but it has no reachable connection route. Prepare a reachable route in AetherLink Runtime, then scan the latest QR.
Open AetherLink Runtime, generate the latest QR, then scan it here.
Latest QR saved for %1$s. Restoring the trusted connection.
Connection details have expired. Scan the latest AetherLink Runtime QR with fresh connection details.
Connection details need refreshing. Scan the latest AetherLink Runtime QR with remote connection details before using AetherLink away from this network.
Connection details need refreshing. Scan the latest AetherLink Runtime QR with connection details.
Trusted connection saved. AetherLink will reconnect when both devices are available.
Connected through AetherLink Runtime. Model traffic stays behind the runtime.
Connected through AetherLink Runtime. Model traffic stays behind the runtime.
Using a diagnostics route for troubleshooting. Normal pairing stays QR-only.
Scan the latest AetherLink Runtime QR with connection details to refresh this trusted connection.
Check the diagnostics route address and port.
Could not connect to AetherLink Runtime.
The trusted runtime is not reachable yet.
Runtime is trusted, but the connection needs a fresh QR scan.
Scan the latest AetherLink Runtime QR with connection details.
The saved connection did not answer. Prepare remote connection details in AetherLink Runtime, then scan the latest QR with connection details.
This device cannot reach the relay route in the QR. Use a public, VPN, tunnel, or private overlay route reachable from both devices, then scan a fresh QR.
Connection details have expired. Scan the latest AetherLink Runtime QR with fresh connection details.
This is not a valid AetherLink pairing QR code.
Latest QR saved. Waiting for both devices to finish the trusted connection.

This QR matches AetherLink Runtime but does not include usable connection details. Nearby discovery works only when the same local route is visible; generate the latest QR with connection details and scan it again.
This QR is only for nearby diagnostics. Generate the latest QR with connection details in AetherLink Runtime and scan it again.
This QR contains connection details this device cannot reach. Generate the latest QR with a route this device can reach.
Pair this device with AetherLink first.
Pair this device with the trusted runtime before connecting.
The runtime rejected the pairing request.
The scanned QR does not match this trusted AetherLink Runtime.
AetherLink Runtime could not verify the saved trust. Scan the latest trusted QR before continuing.
Authenticate with the trusted runtime before using it.
The trusted runtime could not authenticate this device.
Could not prepare trust keys for this device.
Connection could not be verified. Scan the latest AetherLink QR and try again.
Wait for the current response or cancel it before making changes.
Wait for this chat to finish loading.
Could not load chat history from AetherLink Runtime.
This chat could not be found.
Archive this chat before permanently deleting it.
Could not sync this chat change with AetherLink Runtime.
Connect to AetherLink Runtime before changing runtime-saved chats.
Connect to the trusted runtime before changing memory.
Could not load memory from AetherLink Runtime.
Could not load memory suggestions from AetherLink Runtime.
Could not add suggested memory from AetherLink Runtime.
Could not dismiss suggested memory from AetherLink Runtime.
AetherLink Runtime could not complete the request.
Could not send the message to AetherLink Runtime.
There is no completed assistant response to regenerate.
This response used an attachment that is no longer available for regeneration.
This message cannot be reused as a draft.
AetherLink Runtime could not install the model.
You can attach up to 4 files at once.
Choose a vision-capable model before sending an image.
This file type is not supported by the current runtime.
AetherLink Runtime could not read this attachment.
Choose a chat model for conversation.
The QR scanner could not start. Check camera permission or reopen the app.
Check Ollama access in AetherLink Runtime, then try again.
AetherLink Runtime lost communication with the model service.
AetherLink Runtime hit an internal error.
The request could not be completed.
Connection details are not saved yet. Scan the latest AetherLink Runtime QR with connection details.
The local route did not answer. Scan the latest AetherLink Runtime QR with connection details.
Remote connection details are missing. Nearby discovery works only when both devices can see the same local route; scan the latest QR with connection details.
Saved connection did not answer. Prepare remote connection details in AetherLink Runtime, then scan the latest QR with connection details.
This device could not open the relay route. Check the relay, VPN, tunnel, or private overlay, then scan a fresh QR.
Saved connection details could not be authenticated. Scan a fresh QR from the trusted runtime.
Saved connection details expired. Scan the latest AetherLink Runtime QR with fresh connection details.
This QR contains a nearby-only diagnostics route and cannot pair across networks.
This QR points to a route this device cannot reach. Use a relay route reachable from both devices.
Ready to stop the current response.
Ready to return to the latest message.
